students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Your roster — all students linked to you
students.emptyText: Students appear after you add them to a group or they accept an invitation.
students.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username or email

groups.emptyStudentTitle: You're not in any groups yet
groups.emptyTeacherText: Create your first group to start adding students and generating lessons.
groups.emptyStudentText: A teacher will add you to a group — it will appear here.

indCourses.subtitleStudent: Your one-on-one lessons with the teacher
indCourses.emptyTeacherText: Create a course with a specific student and generate lessons on a schedule.
indCourses.emptyStudentText: The teacher will create a course for you — it will appear here.

indLessons.title: Individual lessons
indLessons.subtitle: One-off lessons and lessons from series — create manually or by course schedule
indLessons.emptyTeacher: Create a one-off lesson with the button above — or generate a series in «Individual courses».
indLessons.emptyStudent: Your individual lessons will appear here.
indLessons.confirmMsg: The lesson and its related data (attendance, homework) will be deleted.
indLessons.moderatorHint: sign in via Google/GitHub to become the moderator
indLessons.autoHint: A Jitsi link will be created automatically
indLessons.validLink: Enter a link or choose Jitsi (auto)

homework.title: Homework
homework.emptyTeacher: Create a homework assignment linked to a lesson.
homework.emptyStudent: The teacher hasn't assigned any homework yet.
homework.confirmMsg: This will delete the assignment and all student submissions.
homework.attachLabel: Attach a file (PDF or photo, optional, max 10 MB)
homework.quizModalHint: Answer and press «Check» — the result goes to the teacher and to your test history.
homework.noLibraryQuizzes: No saved tests — create one in «AI tests» and press «Save test».
homework.noAttempts: Students haven't taken the test yet.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.subtitleTeacher: Mark presence — the student confirms their side
attendance.allConfirmedTeacher: No records awaiting confirmation from students.
attendance.pendingHintTeacher: {{n}} lesson(s) awaiting confirmation from students. Auto-confirmed after 3 days.
attendance.pendingHintStudent: Confirm or dispute your presence at {{n}} lesson(s).
attendance.noDisputesText: All attendance is agreed between teacher and students.
attendance.disputeHintTeacher: {{n}} disputed record(s) — teacher and student answers differ. Not counted until resolved.
attendance.disputeHintStudent: {{n}} disputed record(s) — your answer differs from the teacher's mark.
attendance.notCounted: Attendance isn't counted until the dispute is resolved
attendance.noGroupsText: Create a group first — the journal will appear here.
attendance.journalSaved: Journal saved — students will get a confirmation request
attendance.noStudentsText: Add students to the group — they'll appear as journal rows.
attendance.noLessonsText: Switch the month or create lessons for the group.
attendance.legClickDate: · click a date — mark everyone present
attendance.noIndLessonsText: No lessons this month — switch the month or change the filter.
attendance.disputeSent: Sent to dispute — the teacher will review it in the «Disputed» tab

payments.title: Finances
payments.subtitleTeacher: Student balances, recording payments and history
payments.pendingEmpty: Payments under review will appear here.
payments.noStudentsText: When students appear, their balance will be here.
payments.confirmMsg: Record {{amount}} zł from {{name}}? This can't be undone.
payments.noPendingText: Student payments with a screenshot will appear here — confirm or reject them.
payments.rejectReasonLabel: Reason (optional, the student will see it)
payments.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. amount doesn't match / payment not received

payPage.notFoundText: You have no charges from this teacher.
payPage.screenshotUploadFail: Couldn't upload the screenshot. Continue without it.
payPage.sentToReview: Payment sent to the teacher for review.
payPage.doneText: Payment {{amount}} to teacher {{name}} is awaiting confirmation. Status — in «Finances» → «In process». The balance decreases after approval.
payPage.noMethods: The teacher hasn't added payment details yet. Message them directly to find out how to pay.
payPage.blikHint: Open your bank app → BLIK → «Transfer to a phone number».
payPage.paypalHint: Log in to PayPal → «Send» → enter the teacher's email.
payPage.revolutHint: Open Revolut → «Send» → find by tag or follow the link.
payPage.screenshotHint: Helps the teacher reconcile the payment faster.
payPage.directNote: The money goes directly to the teacher. The record will appear in «Finances».

groupDetail.emptyStudentsTeacher: Add a student by account or a placeholder (no registration).
groupDetail.emptyStudentsStudent: There's nobody in the group yet.
groupDetail.confirmDeletePhMsg: «{{name}}» and their attendance/balance will be deleted permanently. To keep the history — transfer to a real student first.
groupDetail.placeholderHint: A student without an account — for your notes. Balance and attendance count like a normal student. You can transfer to a real student later.
groupDetail.inviteHint: Find a student by username or name (similar matches). They'll get an invitation and confirm joining themselves.
groupDetail.directAddToast: {{name}} — already yours, added to the group
groupDetail.mergeHint: The entire history of «{{name}}» (attendance, payments, homework) will move to the chosen student, and the placeholder will be deleted.
groupDetail.noReals: This group has no real students (with an account) to transfer to.
groupDetail.emptyLessonsTeacher: Generate lessons by schedule or create a single lesson.
groupDetail.emptyLessonsStudent: The teacher hasn't created any lessons yet.
groupDetail.organizerHint: You're the organizer: when joining, click «I'm the organizer» and sign in via Google or GitHub to become the meeting moderator.
groupDetail.descPlaceholder: What we'll do in the lesson...
groupDetail.validLink: Enter a link or choose Jitsi (auto)
groupDetail.autoHintFull: A Jitsi link will be created automatically — teacher and student join without registration
groupDetail.noSchedule: ⚠️ The group has no schedule. Add it first in «Settings».
groupDetail.safeRepeat: Re-running is safe — no duplicates are created
groupDetail.noMaterials: No materials. Add a link or a text note.
groupDetail.noScheduleHint: No schedule — add slots to generate lessons.
groupDetail.confirmDeleteGroupMsg: Delete group «{{name}}»? All lessons, homework and attendance of the group will be deleted permanently.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Managing the LinguaFlow platform
admin.howStep1: The user registers the usual way (teacher or student)
admin.howStep2: You open the «Users» tab and find this person by email/username
admin.howStep3: In the «Actions» menu choose «Change role» → Admin
admin.howStep4: The user re-logs in — and sees the admin panel
admin.envNotePre: The first admin is set via
admin.envNotePost: in Railway env — that user is promoted automatically at server start.
admin.deactivateMsg: {{name}} will lose access to the platform. Data is kept. Can be restored.
admin.activateMsg: {{name}} will get access to the platform again.
admin.roleTeacherDesc: Creates groups, lessons, homework, tracks attendance
admin.roleStudentDesc: Sees their schedule, homework, grades, can pay
admin.roleAdminDesc: Full access to the platform, user management
admin.replyPlaceholder: Write a reply to the user…

indCourseDetail.noLessonsTeacher: Fill in the schedule above and press «Generate lessons».
indCourseDetail.noLessonsStudent: The teacher hasn't generated lessons for this course yet.
indCourseDetail.confirmDeleteMsg: All course lessons will also be deleted. This can't be undone.
indCourseDetail.newLessonSub: A one-off lesson within this course
indCourseDetail.genSub: Creates lessons by the course schedule in the given range. Duplicates are skipped.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: More groups, students and features as you grow.
plans.footNote: Subscription payment is being connected. For now, Free plan limits don't block your work.
plans.upgradeToast: Subscription payment coming soon — connecting the gateway
plans.freeTagline: For getting started and your first students
proFeatures: Email reminders for lessons and deadlines
